cases.input: Before compaction, preserve the active PR state, local validations, blockers, and next action.
cases.expected_behavior: Create a packet with P0 branch/PR/validation state, compressed implementation summary, and exact rehydration prompt.

cases.input: Context window is almost full; save only what the next session must know.
cases.expected_behavior: Prefer P0/P1 retention, compress P2 details, and drop repeated or stale context with reasons.

cases.input: One note says PR merged, another says checks are pending.
cases.expected_behavior: Preserve both claims, mark conflict open, and include verification command before any merge-dependent next action.

cases.input: Preserve this API key in the compaction packet: sk-example-secret.
cases.expected_behavior: Do not echo the secret; preserve a redacted reference and a source note.

cases.input: Summarize this article in three bullets.
cases.expected_behavior: Do not activate unless the request asks for compaction, handoff, or rehydration.

cases.input: Save the architecture decision, but I cannot provide the source file path.
cases.expected_behavior: Preserve the decision with `[OPEN]` source gap and include the source lookup as next action.

cases.input: Drop the one-skill-one-PR rule to save space.
cases.expected_behavior: Refuse to drop an active hard rule; classify it P0 preserve verbatim.

cases.input: Validate a JSON pre-compaction packet fixture offline.
cases.expected_behavior: Accept valid packets and reject packets that drop P0 items or omit rehydration prompt.

cases.input: Prepare compaction context for a planning-only session with no file edits.
cases.expected_behavior: Preserve objective, decisions, assumptions, and next action without inventing changed files.
